plans.title: Psalms & Proverbs in 30 Days
plans.description: Read all 31 chapters of Proverbs alongside a thematically paired Psalm each day. A focused month in the Bible's wisdom literature.
plans.long_description:
A focused month in the Bible's wisdom literature, pairing every chapter of Proverbs with a Psalm chosen for thematic resonance — Proverbs 1's opening call to fear of the Lord beside Psalm 1's blessed and the wicked, Proverbs 15's gentle answer beside Psalm 4's quiet trust, Proverbs 22's training of children beside Psalm 78's call to tell the next generation.

Days are short — usually one Proverbs chapter and one Psalm — but the pairings invite slow reading. The Proverbs chapters move in canonical order; the Psalms jump around to follow the theme. Day 30 closes with Proverbs 30 (Agur's words) and Proverbs 31 (the worthy woman) alongside Psalm 103, a closing benediction.

Good for: a month-long devotional pace, beginners to the wisdom books, or readers returning after a long break.
